---
title: &TITLE Sabrina Ciuffoletti 
last: Ciuffoletti
first: Sabrina
people_group: "ResearchFellow"
seniority: 2
email: "sabrina.ciuffoletti@unitn.it"
education:
  - M.S. Mechatronics Engineering | University of Trento | 2026 <br> B.S. Industrial Engineering | University of Trento | 2023
subtitle: "PhD Candidate in System Engineering"
description: ""
project: "neu4mes"
affiliation: University of Trento
# image: avatar.jpg
image: https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/5580/5580993.png
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  # sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: *TITLE
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]
page-layout: full
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/5580/5580993.png
  # image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:sabrina.ciuffoletti@unitn.it
  #   - text: Google Scholar
  #     icon: mortarboard 
  #     href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_csJIOYAAAAJ&hl=it&oi=ao
  #   - icon: github
  #     text: GitHub 
  #     href: https://github.com/Mattiapzz
  #   - icon: globe2
  #     text: Website 
  #     href: https://mattiapzz.github.io/
---

<hr>


:::{#about}



## Education
{{< meta education >}}

<br>

:::
## Group Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
